---
title: "Cell Ranger QC report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    df_print: paged
params:
  dirs: !r list()
  ids: !r NULL
  thresholds: !r NULL
  include_h5: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(cellrangercheck)
dirs <- unlist(params$dirs)
ids <- if (is.null(params$ids)) NULL else unlist(params$ids)
thresholds <- if (is.null(params$thresholds)) default_thresholds() else params$thresholds
```

```{r parse}
long <- parse_cellranger_runs(dirs, ids = ids)
meta <- do.call(rbind, lapply(dirs, run_metadata))
wide <- metrics_wide(long)
flags <- flag_qc(long, thresholds)
status <- qc_status(flags)
```

# Run overview

Number of GEM wells: **`r length(dirs)`**. Pipelines:
`r paste(sort(unique(long$pipeline)), collapse = ", ")`.

```{r meta}
DT::datatable(meta, rownames = FALSE, options = list(dom = "t"))
```

# Overall QC status

```{r status}
DT::datatable(status, rownames = FALSE, options = list(dom = "t"))
```

# Comparable per-sample metrics

```{r wide}
DT::datatable(wide, rownames = FALSE,
              options = list(scrollX = TRUE, pageLength = 25))
```

# Flagged metrics

```{r flags}
library(ggplot2)
if (nrow(flags)) {
  flags$label <- paste(flags$library_type, flags$metric, sep = ": ")
  ggplot(flags, aes(x = sample_id, y = label, fill = status)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(pass = "#2c7fb8", warn = "#fec44f",
                                 fail = "#de2d26"), na.value = "grey85") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "status") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
} else {
  cat("No metrics matched the supplied thresholds.")
}
```

```{r flags_table}
DT::datatable(flags, rownames = FALSE, options = list(scrollX = TRUE))
```

# Barcode-rank curves

```{r barcode_ranks, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
if (isTRUE(params$include_h5)) {
  br <- lapply(seq_along(dirs), function(i) {
    out <- tryCatch(barcode_ranks(dirs[i]), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(out)) return(NULL)
    df <- out$ranks
    df$run_id <- if (is.null(ids)) basename(dirs[i]) else ids[i]
    df$knee <- out$knee
    df
  })
  br <- do.call(rbind, Filter(Negate(is.null), br))
  if (!is.null(br) && nrow(br)) {
    ggplot(br, aes(rank, total_umi, color = run_id)) +
      geom_line() +
      geom_hline(aes(yintercept = knee, color = run_id), linetype = "dashed") +
      scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
      labs(x = "Barcode rank", y = "Total UMI", color = "GEM well") +
      theme_minimal()
  }
}
```

# Per-cell UMI / gene distributions

```{r umi_gene}
if (isTRUE(params$include_h5)) {
  dist <- tryCatch(umi_gene_distribution(dirs, ids = ids),
                   error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(dist)) {
    DT::datatable(dist, rownames = FALSE, options = list(scrollX = TRUE, dom = "t"))
  }
}
```
